info.title: Wasla AI Agent APIs
info.summary: Agentic AI backend for Wasla CRM and Customer Portals
info.description:
This API provides agentic conversational interfaces for both the Wasla Customer Portal and the Internal Company CRM. It operates natively using local Ollama models (e.g. Qwen 2.5) or configured OpenRouter models to process intent and automatically execute backend actions.

## Endpoints

| Endpoint | Transport | Context | Capabilities |
|----------|-----------|---------|--------------|
| `POST /api/chat/{company_id}` | JSON | Public Customer Portal | General inquiries, submitting service requests, checking offers. |
| `POST /api/company/chat` | JSON | Internal CRM | Full CRM capabilities (Customers, Offers, Tasks, Appointments). Requires JWT Bearer token authentication. |

---
**Authentication:** Include standard `Bearer <JWT_TOKEN>` in the headers when accessing protected internal endpoints.

post.summary: Customer Portal — Agentic chat with tool calling
post.description:
**Customer Portal chat endpoint** — agentic tool-calling loop.

The LLM can invoke 27 tools covering the full Customer Portal API:
auth, companies, reviews, profiles, offers, service requests, dashboard.

Click the **lock icon** (top-right) and paste your JWT to authenticate.
Public actions (browse companies, view reviews) work without auth.

Staff-facing chat endpoint with 40 tools for CRM operations:
customers, offers, tasks, employees, expenses, dashboard, service requests.

Click the lock icon and paste a staff JWT to authenticate.

get.description:
Returns the service status, configured model names, and key settings.

Use this endpoint to verify the API is running and to inspect which
models and voices are currently active.

200.description: Current service status and configured models.

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: The user's message to the AI assistant.

conversation_history.title: Conversation History
conversation_history.description: Previous messages for multi-turn context. Each dict must have `role` (user/assistant/system) and `content` keys.

examples.content: Hi! How can I help you?

ChatRequest.title: ChatRequest
ChatRequest.description: Body for the main chat endpoint (Route 1).

examples.prompt: Tell me more about the first one

response.title: Response
response.description: The AI assistant's response text (may contain Markdown).

tool_calls_made.title: Tool Calls Made
tool_calls_made.description: Number of tool calls executed during this request.

model_used.title: Model Used
model_used.description: The HF model that produced the response.

ChatResponse.title: ChatResponse
ChatResponse.description: JSON response from the main chat endpoint.

examples.response:
Here are your top 5 customers:

1. Acme Corp — $12,400
2. ...
